description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows 11 desktop with daily OHLCV data for SPY (S&P 500 ETF) available. Create a 'Projection' chart view for SPY to facilitate forward-looking technical analysis. Configure a daily SPY chart with a 250-pixel right side margin and 15-pixel bar spacing. Set the Y-axis scaling to 'Fixed' with a maximum of 550 and a minimum of 350. Disable the vertical grid lines so only horizontal lines remain and save the workspace to ensure the configuration persists.
